<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Compare previous_frame to current_frame
before = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation
after = last_transition.after_frame.segmentation

before_nodes = {n['id'] for n in before['nodes']}
after_nodes = {n['id'] for n in after['nodes']}

print("Before nodes count:", len(before_nodes))
print("After nodes count:", len(after_nodes))

# Find differences
for n in after_nodes:
    b_n = before_nodes.get(n['id'])
    if b_n:
        if n['color'] != b_n['color'] or n['pixels'] != b_n['pixels']:
            print("Changed node %d: color %s -> %s" % (n['id'], b_n['color'], n['color']))
    else:
        print("New node %d: %s" % (n['id'], n['color']))

# Check for removed nodes
for n in before_nodes:
    if n['id'] not in after_nodes:
        print("Removed node %d: %s" % (n['id'], n['color']))
